persona_insight.narrative: Muhammad Alam shows a strategy persona anchored in execution feasibility and platform-level coherence. The dominant decision style is platform-centric acquisition. The recurring value proposition is accelerating core platform adoption through strategic data asset integration. Observed preferences include alliances with complementary data/AI players, cloud-native technology migrations, addressing non-SAP data integration gaps. Non-negotiables include must strengthen SAP's AI platform data foundation, must maintain cloud architecture standards. Key event trajectory: 2026-03: SAP announces acquisition of Reltio. This aligns with the case strategy context: acquisition_to_overcome_adoption_resistance.

key_traits.evidence_summary: alliances with complementary data/AI players; cloud-native technology migrations; addressing non-SAP data integration gaps
must strengthen SAP's AI platform data foundation; must maintain cloud architecture standards
